parameters: Change total passive to 5, total ulti to 2 and total skill to 16?
\n<Einhart Sylvian>Suỵt...! Tôi cần phải tập trung đấy...
\n<Einhart Sylvian>Why are you still here? Take Plati here fast before it is too late.
\n<Einhart Sylvian>Sao các bạn vẫn còn ở đây? Đưa Plati tới cho tôi mau lên trước khi quá muộn.
\n<Professor>Looks like you have messed your stats up, but worry no more! I can help you to reset them and you will get your spent JPs back. So whose stats do you wanna reset?
\n<Professor>It is done! Be careful on spending JPs next time!
